== Notes for [[Item:Q105118|Q105118]] ==

The Unbroken Chain, Neil Rosenstein, 1990, page 12 G5.7

--------------------

Married twice, Naftali Hirsch Ginzburg, and Yakov Lubliner. Mother of Chanukas Hatorah - Avraham Yehoshua Heschel

Bobov Tree Anaf Vav (Hay)
Unbroken Chain p. 383


G5.7. Deborah, married R. Naftali Hirsch Gunzburg as his first wife. He was A.B.D. of Pinsk and Slutzk, and died in 1687. Deborah was from the second marriage. His first wife was Deborah's cousin, Rebecca, daughter of Judah Wahl (G4.6. below). Deborah was also married to R. Jacob Weil, A.B.D. Brest and Lublin, son of Ephraim Naftali Hirsch (Herz) Weil, A.B.D. Ludmir. Herz's father was R. Jonah Weil with the title of Oberrabbiner of Burgau, Schwaben and Schweiz, with his seat in Gunzburg, son of R. Jacob Weil, Landesrabbiner of Bavaria, son of the MaHaRaM Weil in Ulm, son of R. Jacob Weil (the prominent scholar known as MaHaRIY, died before 1456) of Nuremburg, son of Judah.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5363883374310034514

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
